changes_made.description: New shared hook extracted from duplicated search logic in MarkdownWithSearch and CodeViewerWithSearch. Encapsulates search state, case-insensitive line matching, and cyclic navigation.
New shared search bar component extracted from duplicated JSX in MarkdownWithSearch and CodeViewerWithSearch. Includes keyboard shortcuts (Escape, Enter, Shift+Enter).
Replaced ~120 lines of duplicated search logic in MarkdownWithSearch and CodeViewerWithSearch with useFileContentSearch hook and FileSearchBar component. Removed unused X import.
Added 10 unit tests covering: initialization, open/close, case-insensitive matching, minimum query length, undefined content, cyclic next/prev navigation, and query change reset.

refactorings_applied: DRY: Extract duplicated search state/logic into useFileContentSearch hook
DRY: Extract duplicated search bar UI into FileSearchBar component
Cleanup: Remove unused X import from FilePanelContent
commits: 94c8fe8: refactor(file-panel): extract duplicated search logic into shared hook and component
notes: The primary DRY violation was ~120 lines of identical search logic duplicated between MarkdownWithSearch and CodeViewerWithSearch in FilePanelContent.tsx. Other files (useFilePolling, useFileContentPolling, file-polling-config, useFileTabs, markdown-editor types, API route, FilePanelTabs, FilePanelSplit, MarkdownEditor) were reviewed and found to be well-structured with clear single responsibilities, proper typing, and no significant code smells.
